title: Portable Context Control Plane — Component Registry Input
description: Schema for the --registry CLI input file. A bare JSON array of component objects, validated before selector fan-out. Class A input — if absent or unloadable, the planning run halts immediately. Each component entry is validated against the Component $def below. Non-MVP fields contentInline, dependencies, budgetTrimmable, and privacyLevel must NOT appear here. Provider, model, cache, OpenClaw adapter, and model-assisted analyzer fields must NOT appear here. Cross-field validation rules (riskLevel: critical requiring at least one hard protection; tokensApprox: 0 only valid with metadataOnly: true; duplicate id detection; defaultAction: omit overridden by loader when paired with retainPolicy: mandatory/safety_critical or omissionPolicy: never) are loader/orchestrator logic, not JSON Schema logic. evidenceRequired grammar is loader/orchestrator validation — the schema accepts any non-empty string at the boundary. Canonical owners: docs/05 §3–§8; docs/12 §3.2.
$comment: Pass 4.9C-5B — Batch B extension. No code. No runtime. No provider/model calls. No docs edited. Source count note: docs/12 §3.2 states '16 required fields + 2 optional MVP fields' but docs/05 §3 Minimum Required Fields table lists 18 fields (id, type, title, summary, source, tokensApprox, charsApprox, riskLevel, requiredWhen, safeToOmitWhen, defaultAction, omissionPolicy, retainPolicy, budgetPriority, evidenceRequired, tags, version, hash). This schema follows the docs/05 §3 table (18 required) as the canonical source. The docs/12 §3.2 '16' count is an out-of-scope docs/12 discrepancy to be resolved in a later pass. Canonical sources: docs/05 §3–§8; docs/12 §3.2.

Component.title: Component registry entry
Component.description: A single component object in the registry. Validated at load time before selector fan-out. All 18 required fields must be present. Optional MVP fields metadataOnly and formatTag are recognized. additionalProperties: false — unknown fields (including all future-only excluded fields) are rejected at the schema boundary. Cross-field rules (e.g. riskLevel: critical protection requirement; tokensApprox: 0 only with metadataOnly: true; defaultAction: omit override on mandatory/safety_critical components; duplicate id detection) are enforced by the registry loader and orchestrator, not by JSON Schema.

id.title: Component ID
id.description: Stable dot-namespaced identifier for this component. Must be unique within the registry. Duplicate detection is loader/orchestrator logic — JSON Schema does not validate uniqueness across array items. Pattern: ^[a-z][a-z0-9._-]*$ — lowercase start, then alphanumeric, dots, underscores, hyphens. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

type.title: Component type
type.description: Component category. Must be one of the 8 canonical MVP component types. Determines which selector handles this component during fan-out. Canonical: docs/05 §4.

title.title: Component title
title.description: Human-readable name for this component. Non-empty, max 120 characters. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

summary.title: Component summary
summary.description: One-sentence description of what this component provides. Non-empty, max 300 characters. Must not contain raw component content. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

source.title: Component source
source.description: Where the component content comes from. File path, logical ID, or URI. Format is runtime-specific. Must not be empty. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

tokensApprox.title: Approximate token count
tokensApprox.description: Estimated token count of this component's content. Must be >= 1 unless metadataOnly: true (in which case 0 is permitted). The constraint tokensApprox >= 1 when metadataOnly is false or absent is a cross-field rule enforced by the loader, not JSON Schema — this schema enforces only minimum: 0. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

charsApprox.title: Approximate character count
charsApprox.description: Estimated character count of this component's content. Must be >= 1 unless metadataOnly: true (in which case 0 is permitted). Same cross-field boundary as tokensApprox. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

riskLevel.title: Risk level
riskLevel.description: How dangerous omission of this component is. Must be one of the 4 canonical values. riskLevel: critical requires at least one hard protection (retainPolicy: safety_critical OR omissionPolicy: never) — this cross-field constraint is loader validation, not JSON Schema. Canonical: docs/05 §5.

requiredWhen.title: Required-when tag list
requiredWhen.description: Prompt family tags for which this component must be included. An empty array means no tag triggers a required-include rule for this component. Matching is exact string comparison against the resolved promptFamily. Canonical: docs/05 §3 and §6.

safeToOmitWhen.title: Safe-to-omit-when tag list
safeToOmitWhen.description: Prompt family tags for which it is safe to omit this component (Path A). An empty array means Path A is unavailable for this component (safeToOmitWhen match is required for Path A). Matching is exact string comparison. Canonical: docs/05 §3 and §6.

defaultAction.title: Default action
defaultAction.description: What to do when no requiredWhen or safeToOmitWhen tag matches. Must be one of: include, omit, defer. defaultAction: omit combined with retainPolicy: mandatory/safety_critical or omissionPolicy: never is overridden to include by the loader (non-fatal warning, not halt). This cross-field override is loader logic, not JSON Schema. Canonical: docs/05 §5.

omissionPolicy.title: Omission policy
omissionPolicy.description: How to behave when selector evidence is insufficient. allow = omission permitted if evidence supports it. fail_open = include when uncertain (not trimmable by Budgeter in MVP). never = always include regardless of selector output. Canonical: docs/05 §5.

retainPolicy.title: Retain policy
retainPolicy.description: How the Budgeter and selectors must treat this component. optional = budget-trimmable if low-priority. durable = retain unless strong evidence. mandatory = must be in every plan. safety_critical = cannot be removed under any circumstance; triggers budgetOverflow rather than trim. Canonical: docs/05 §5.

budgetPriority.title: Budget priority
budgetPriority.description: Budgeter trim order. Integer 1–10. Lower value = trimmed first; higher value = trimmed last. Used as a tie-breaker when multiple optional components must be dropped. Valid schema data must have budgetPriority in [1, 10] — this schema rejects out-of-range values. Any pre-schema clamping or normalization of out-of-range values is a separate loader pre-normalization step and is not represented as valid schema data. Canonical: docs/05 §5.

evidenceRequired.title: Evidence required expression
evidenceRequired.description: Additional signal conditions for Path A omission, beyond the safeToOmitWhen tag match. null = no additional evidence required; safeToOmitWhen match alone is sufficient for Path A (a validation warning is emitted by the loader if omissionPolicy: allow and safeToOmitWhen is non-empty). Non-null string = constrained expression using recognized MVP atoms (promptFamily=<value>, riskLevel=<value>, explicitUserConstraint=false) combined with AND. Grammar validation and atom recognition are loader/orchestrator logic — this schema accepts any non-empty string at the boundary. Invalid grammar disables Path A for the component (not normalized to null). OR and NOT are not supported in MVP. Key must always be present; value may be null. Canonical: docs/05 §7.

tags.title: Classification tags
tags.description: Classification labels for filtering and grouping. May be empty array. Each element must be non-empty string. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

version.title: Component version
version.description: Version of this component definition. Semver or opaque version string. Required for registry evolution and future drift tracking. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

hash.title: Content hash
hash.description: SHA-256 content hash for drift detection. Key must always be present. Value is null when hash has not yet been computed. If non-null, must be exactly 64 lowercase hexadecimal characters. Hash mismatch (field present but not matching content) is detected by the loader, not JSON Schema. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

metadataOnly.title: Metadata only flag
metadataOnly.description: Optional MVP field. If true, this component is a metadata descriptor with no inline content (e.g., history lane descriptors). tokensApprox and charsApprox may be 0 when this is true. Default: false if absent. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

formatTag.title: Output format tag
formatTag.description: Optional MVP field. Output-format tag matched by the output_format selector against outputFormatHint in requestSignals. Meaningful only for type: output_format components — other types should omit this field or set it to null. If absent or null on an output_format component, the selector cannot authorize omission via outputFormatHint matching and must fail open. Canonical: docs/05 §3.

examples.title: General Assistant Persona
examples.summary: Defines the agent's general assistant persona and behavioral guidelines.

examples.title: Privacy Constraint Policy
examples.summary: Defines what the agent must not disclose, share, or expose about user data.

examples.title: Durable Constraints History Lane
examples.summary: Metadata descriptor for the durable_constraints history lane. Turns in this lane must never be dropped.
